{{Quote|It seems Jabba has been digging up the past. I pulled this off of his comm net once we gained control of Saleucami. Evidently he's found an old battle droid factory on Hypori that wasn't destroyed when the Republic raided it during the Clone Wars.|[[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="FoC" />}}
This '''droid factory''' was one of many [[Droid factory|droid factories]] owned and operated by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]], which produced thousands of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] for their [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].<ref name="CW20">{{CW|20}}</ref>

==History==
[[File:HyporiBattle.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Zann Consortium/Legends|Consortium]] mercs and a [[Droideka Mark II]] in the [[Ground Battle on Hypori]].]]
The factory was discovered by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Daakman Barrek]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Sha'a Gi]], ensuing in the [[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Battle of Hypori]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I||Gi Sha'a}}</ref> This particular [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory somehow survived the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|deactivation]] of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].

[[File:Hypori-droid-factory.png|thumb|right|250px|A overhead perspective featuring a part of the factory's layout.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] took an interest in this factory, and [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] hoped to use it to destroy [[Tyber Zann]] and [[Zann Consortium/Legends|his army]]. However, his plan was a [[Ground Battle on Hypori|failure]] due to Zann's tenacity. After that, Tyber would use Hypori's resources to produce [[droideka Mark II]]s, powerful droids that would be used to spread his corruption across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="FoC" />
